testcase.name: test_school_dashboard_stats
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_command_center_stats.py:226: in test_school_dashboard_stats assert metrics["totalStudents"] == 25, f"Expected 25 students, got {metrics['totalStudents']}" E AssertionError: Expected 25 students, got {'value': 25, 'change': '+25', 'changeType': 'up', 'status': 'normal'} E assert {'change': '+25', 'changeType': 'up', 'status': 'normal', 'value': 25} == 25

testcase.name: test_school_settings_returns_data

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('school' in {'academic_structure': {'grades': [{'created_at': '2026-03-12T15:04:25.257000', 'grade_level': 1, 'id': 'grade-1', 'is_active': True, ...}, {'created_at': '2026-03-12T15:04:25.257000', 'grade_level': 2, 'id': 'grade-2', 'is_active': True, ...}, {'created_at': '2026-03-12T15:04:25.257000', 'grade_level': 3, 'id': 'grade-3', 'is_active': True, ...}, {'created_at': '2026-03-12T15:04:25.257000', 'grade_level': 4, 'id': 'grade-4', 'is_active': True, ...}, {'created_at': '2026-03-12T15:04:25.257000', 'grade_level': 5, 'id': 'grade-5', 'is_active': True, ...}, {'created_at': '2026-03-12T15:04:25.257000', 'grade_level': 6, 'id': 'grade-6', 'is_active': True, ...}, ...], 'stages': [{'created_at': '2026-03-12T15:04:25.257000', 'id': 'stage-elementary', 'is_active': True, 'name_ar': 'المرحلة الابتدائية', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-03-12T15:04:25.257000', 'id': 'stage-middle', 'is_active': True, 'name_ar': 'المرحلة المتوسطة', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-03-12T15:04:25.257000', 'id': 'stage-high', 'is_active': True, 'name_ar': 'المرحلة الثانوية', ...}], 'tracks': [{'code': 'general', 'created_at': '2026-03-12T15:04:25.257000',
